name: enhancement-hooks-plan
question: What enhancement hooks will the domain need?
decision: enhanceModels: Membership.level (numeric role value), Invitation.isExpired (computed from expiresAt); enhanceCollections: membershipCollection.findByUserId(userId), membershipCollection.findForResource(type, id); enhanceRootStore: initialize() syncs from ITeamsService, resolvePermissions(userId, resourceType, resourceId) walks hierarchy for max role
rationale: All hooks implemented in single domain.ts using createStoreFromScope(). Computed views derive from stored fields. Collection queries enable efficient lookups. Root store coordinates permission resolution across hierarchy.
